task.description: Set up Telegram bot for clarification questions

question:
This task is about setting up YOUR Telegram bot credentials. I cannot complete this without your action:

1. **Create a bot** at https://t.me/BotFather
2. **Get your chat ID** from https://t.me/userinfobot
3. **Add the secrets** to your GitHub repository

Once you've done these steps, let me know and I can verify the integration is working properly!
